author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: PCF
description: Scaffolds a PCF control project: ControlManifest.Input.xml + index.ts (StandardControl with init/updateView/getOutputs/destroy) + .csproj (TALXIS.DevKit.Build.Sdk) + tsconfig.json + package.json (pcf-scripts) + eslint.config.mjs + pcfconfig.json. Required: Name, Namespace.

Name.description: Name of the PCF control used as the TypeScript class name and registered in ControlManifest.Input.xml.

Namespace.description: TypeScript namespace for the PCF control, used to scope the control class in ControlManifest.Input.xml.
